name: Impossible Cheeseburger Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheddar or American cheese; shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10-inch round, or square baking dish, 8x8, or 6 custard cups.
3. Cook and stir ground beef and onions in a skillet over medium heat until the beef is brown; drain.
4. Stir in salt and pepper.
5. Spread mixture in the prepared pie plate.
6. Beat milk, eggs, and Bisquick for 15 seconds in a blender on high speed, or whisk for 1 minute with a wire whisk or hand beater until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
9. Top with tomato slices and sprinkle cheese.
10. Bake an additional 5-8 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
11. Cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Half Recipe Instructions:
1. Use a 1 quart square or round casserole dish.
2. Decrease eggs to 2 cups and Bisquick to half the amount.
3. Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half.
4. Reduce blending time to 10 seconds in blender, or whisk for 30 seconds with a wire whisk or hand beater.
5. If using the half recipe: Increase the first bake time to 30 minutes.
Note: For high altitudes, increase baking time as needed.
